user_query: I'm planning a family game night and I need some interesting trivia questions. Can you give me 15 trivia questions about food and drink, along with their answers? Also, I want to know the correct answer for today's word in the Wordle Game API. Lastly, I would like to retrieve the latest results from Aviator at BET7K.

TaskList.description: Retrieve 15 trivia questions and their answers about food and drink.
Get today's correct answer for the Wordle game.
Retrieve the latest results from Aviator at BET7K.
